case_title: JULIE WATANABE VS. CHENG CHANG CHEN

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WATANABE, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, CHENG CHANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-22-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JULIE WATANABE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHENG CHANG CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-08-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JULIE WATANABE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHENG CHANG CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS IN COURT FOR ADDITIONAL TIME TO PREPARE FOR THE CASE DUE TO MEDICAL REASON. DEFENDANT CHENG CHANG CHEN RECEIVES COPY OF THE PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS HANDED OVER BY PLAINTIFF IN COURT. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JULIE WATANABE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHENG CHANG CHEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATANABE, JULIE
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-21-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-07-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $250. SERVED FEB-04-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, CHENG CHANG
